input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.8.2
            TITLE: if a team wishes to use any parts, processes or materials not included in the tables, an add

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.8.2: If a team wishes to use any Parts, Processes or Materials not included in the tables, an Add
S.3.8.2 If a team wishes to use any Parts, Processes or Materials not included in the tables, an Add 
Item Request must be submitted.  See S.3.10
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 121 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: If a team wishes to use any Parts, Processes or Materials not included in the tables, an Add Item Request must be submitted.
